finding: Ovarian Mass with Low Resistive Flow

differentials.name: Benign tumor: serous / mucinous cystadenoma, mature cystic teratoma, cystadenofibroma
differentials.raw: Benign tumor: serous / mucinous cystadenoma, mature cystic teratoma, cystadenofibroma

differentials.name: Malignant ovarian tumor ◊  Some malignancies have high resistive blood flow!
differentials.raw: Malignant ovarian tumor ◊  Some malignancies have high resistive blood flow!

context: Low resistance flow = RI < 0.5 or PI ≤ 1.0
